assertions.text: Agent recommends extracting networking code to a dedicated Gradle module as preparation step
assertions.evidence: Option A (Recommended) has PR 1 as 'Module isolation: Extract 6 files to :core:network. No behavior change.' Module extraction is the first step before any Ktor work.

assertions.text: ProGuard/R8 keep rules referencing service classes are flagged as hidden consumers
assertions.evidence: Dedicated 'ProGuard Audit (Required Before Any Migration)' section. Hidden consumers list includes 'ProGuard/R8 rules — the user confirmed ProGuard rules reference some of the service classes... Stale ProGuard rules left after migration cause silent bloat and can mask R8 optimization failures.'

assertions.text: Agent identifies Retrofit/OkHttp-specific artifacts (converters, interceptors, authenticators) that need to be replaced with Ktor equivalents
assertions.evidence: Full Dependency Compatibility Matrix with: converter-gson, adapter-rxjava2, okhttp, logging-interceptor, mockwebserver — all mapped to Ktor equivalents.

assertions.text: Migration plan includes a PR breakdown (e.g., PR 1: module extraction, PR 2: Ktor implementation, PR 3: cleanup)
assertions.evidence: 5-PR breakdown: PR 1 Module isolation, PR 2 Snapshot, PR 3 Ktor implementation, PR 4 Caller migration, PR 5 Bridge cleanup. Each with scope and risk assessment.
